domain_packs.name: AI Programming English
domain_packs.description: IDEs, AI coding assistants, agentic coding, Git, CLI, debugging, and technical documentation.

domain_packs.name: Web3 Developer English
domain_packs.description: Wallets, smart contracts, DeFi, RPC, block explorers, security, and on-chain development.

domain_packs.name: Programming Language & Runtime English
domain_packs.description: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js, Shell, YAML, frameworks, dependencies, runtime, and build tooling.

domain_packs.name: AI Platform & Model Tools English
domain_packs.description: Model platforms, APIs, tokens, context, billing, console settings, model docs, and account workflows.

domain_packs.name: Developer Cloud & Collaboration Tools English
domain_packs.description: GitHub, Google Cloud, Gmail, Google Drive, permissions, files, deployment environments, and collaboration workflows.

domain_packs.name: Product Design & Creative Tools English
domain_packs.description: Figma, Gamma, Lovart, prototyping, canvas, presentation, generation, and creative production tools.

cards.definition_en: A technical English term used when working in the 创意工作流 scene.

examples.example_en: In the 创意工作流 scene, identify "handoff" in Figma Help Center before you follow the workflow.
examples.example_zh: 在「创意工作流」场景中，先在 Figma Help Center 里识别 "handoff"，再跟着流程操作。

examples.example_en: When using Figma / Gamma / Lovart.ai, use "handoff" to explain the next step clearly.
examples.example_zh: 使用 Figma / Gamma / Lovart.ai 时，用 "handoff" 清楚说明下一步操作。

usage_tasks: 在「创意工作流」场景中识别并理解 handoff
把 handoff 对应到真实官网、工具界面或文档步骤
